About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Output Today's data reveals an extraordinary outlier in AXTI, which dominates the ranking with a score of 98.2 and a staggering 1-year return of 9,887.94%, vastly outpacing broader indices (SPY +9,860 outperformance). This stock demonstrates textbook momentum characteristics: it passes all four SMA gates (trading above the 30, 50, 100, and 200-day moving averages), maintains a "clean" momentum signal at 0.8, and shows exceptional resilience on bad SPY days with a score of 99.93. In stark contrast, PBT ranks second with a more measured 1-year return of 180.38% and a lower overall score, suggesting AXTI's performance is genuinely exceptional rather than reflective of typical top-ranked momentum stocks. AXTI's ratio consistency across timeframes (4 out of 5 ratio passes) and its correlation strength with the technology sector (0.353 with XLK) indicate sustained momentum building across multiple timeframes rather than a single-day spike.
